pages.title: Chunk Loading Comparison
pages.text: $(bold)Without FPSCompress$() (factory running normally): CM Dimension: 6x6 chunks = 36 chunks loaded TPS Impact: 5-10 TPS loss (depends on factory complexity)$(br2)$(bold)With FPSCompress$() (CACHED mode): CM Dimension: 0 chunks loaded TPS Impact: <0.1 TPS loss (just PreFab math)$(br2)$(bold)Improvement$(): ~5-10 TPS per factory (can scale to 20+ for complex factories)

pages.title: Scaling Benefits
pages.text: $(bold)One factory$(): $(li)Improvement: ~5 TPS$(br2)$(bold)Ten factories$(): $(li)Without FPSCompress: ~50 TPS loss → Server unplayable $(li)With FPSCompress: ~1 TPS loss → Server runs smooth$(br2)$(bold)FPSCompress enables massive factory scaling.$()
